summary: All 7 requested features tested and verified. Stats banner shows player count (not celebrity count) and transfer window status. Pricing endpoint returns new tier structure (A-list £9-12m, B-list £5-8m, C-list £2-4m, D-list £0.5-1.5m). Search filtering blocks locations (mariehamn returns 0 results). Hot celebs have real Wikipedia photos. HowItWorks shows updated pricing. Search bar appears before Hot Celebs in layout.

minor.issue: Taylor Swift stored as B-List with £13M price (was likely A-List when added). Price doesn't match current tier range. This is stale data, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Stats endpoint returns player_count (team count), not celebrity count
Stats endpoint returns transfer_window with is_open and status fields
Transfer window status format: 'Opens in 11h' (correct format)
Pricing endpoint /api/pricing-info returns 200
Pricing endpoint has 4 tiers (A, B, C, D)
A-List pricing: £9m-£12m
B-List pricing: £5m-£8m
C-List pricing: £2m-£4m
D-List pricing: £0.5m-£1.5m
Dynamic pricing explanation present
Transfer window timing: Saturday 12pm GMT for 24 hours
Search 'mariehamn' returns 0 results (location filtered)
Search 'ifk mariehamn' returns 0 results (sports team filtered)
Hot celebs endpoint returns 200
Hot celebs have images
Hot celebs have real Wikipedia photos (8/8 real photos, 0 initials)
Hot celebs have required fields (name, tier, category, hot_reason, price)
Celebrity prices within tier ranges (with controversy boost allowance)
UI: Player count label visible in stats banner
UI: Transfer Window label visible with status 'Opens in 11h'
UI: HowItWorks section shows A-list £9-12M pricing
UI: HowItWorks section shows D-list £0.5-1.5M pricing
UI: Search bar appears BEFORE Hot Celebs section
UI: Hot Celebs appears BEFORE Today's News section
UI: Points methodology modal shows all 4 tier prices
UI: Points methodology modal shows dynamic pricing info
UI: Points methodology modal shows Saturday 12pm GMT transfer window
critical_code_review_comments: Taylor Swift in database has tier 'B' but price £13M which exceeds B-List range (£5-8m). This is because she was likely added when calculated as A-List or with high controversy boost. Consider adding a price recalculation on hot-celebs fetch to ensure consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features from iteration 9 verified: (1) Stats banner shows player_count and transfer_window status. (2) Transfer window shows 'Opens in Xh' format. (3) /api/pricing-info returns new tier structure. (4) Search filtering blocks locations like 'mariehamn'. (5) Hot celebs have real Wikipedia photos. (6) HowItWorks shows updated pricing text. (7) Search bar appears before Hot Celebs in layout.
